# Identity integration

<!-- TODO: This section requires authoring. No source content exists in the previous guide structure; it must be written to meet the HVD structure specification. -->

<Note>

This section is a placeholder and needs to be authored.

</Note>

**Intended scope:** Covers connecting Boundary to the organisation's identity provider at install time — initial auth method setup, LDAP/Active Directory or OIDC connection, and the minimum IAM configuration required before handover. Ongoing identity management belongs in the Administration Guide; end-user identity configuration belongs in the User Guide.
